title: Dr. Aggarwal’s Wellness multispeciality hospital | Healthcare
heading: Your Wellness Is Our Priority
description: Dr. Aggarwal’s Wellness Multispeciality Hospital is located in Delhi. We are committed to providing high-quality, cost-efficient & affordable healthcare.
text:

Consult us today We are dedicated to providing state-of-the-art healthcare services and treatments to each and every one. As per the growing healthcare needs of society, we aim to provide quality and affordable healthcare with commitment. Dr. Anuj Aggarwal (MBBS, MD) Director & Founder Our Departments At Dr. Aggarwal’s Wellness Multispeciality Hospital , we provide the care and
                        treatment of  the diseases related to the following departments. Dermatology Dermatology Diabetes & Medicine Diabetes & Medicine Gynae & Obstetrics Gynae & Obstetrics urology urology pediatrics pediatrics Cardiology OPD Cardiology OPD Orthopedics Orthopedics Other Departments Other Departments Book An Appointment Book An Appointment Book Now 24 x 7 Customer Support We ensure that you will get a great experience with our services. Now getting an appointment or a meeting with the doctor is become easy. So, whenever you need an appointment, we are available 24x7 to fix your appointment. +91 7290002072 About Us Dr. Aggarwal's Wellness Multispeciality Hospital is one of the best hospitals located in Delhi with advanced healthcare facilities. The hospital focuses on delivering various medical specialties that meet the healthcare needs of the population. Here one can get the best treatment of diseases related to the departments of Skin, Hair, and Nails (Dermatology), Obstetrics & Gynaecology, Diabetes & Medicine, Urology, Pediatrics, Orthopaedics, Cardiology, ENT (Ear, Nose & Throat), Physiotherapy, General surgery, and Anesthesia. The Hospital has the modern facilities of Digital X-Ray, Ultrasound, Fetal Echocardiogram (Fetal Echo), Doppler Study, ECG, NICU (Neonatal Intensive Care Unit), C-Arm Machine (OT), Modular Operating Theatre, Emergency Ward, Anesthesia Workstation (OT), Micro & Pathology Lab, Isolation Room, Sample Collection and Pharmacy. Know More Why Choose Us At Dr. Aggarwal’s Wellness Multispeciality Hospital , we not only cure but also care for you. Our primary aim is to provide quality healthcare services and the best treatment at an affordable price to everyone. Let’s see why you should choose us for your treatment. Highly Qualified We have a team of highly qualified paramedics and highly experienced doctors. Reasonable Price We provide the best medical treatments at a reasonable price. Advanced Technology We use digital technology to support patient administration systems. Personalise Care We also provide personalized care to our patients with treatment. Advanced Equipment We use the latest and advanced medical equipment of the highest caliber. Feedback System We always work on the feedback of our patients. Book An Appointment Book Appointment Our Teams We have a team of highly qualified paramedics and experienced doctors who are dedicated  to treat you and to keep you healthy. Dr. Anuj Aggarwal (MBBS, MD) Consultant Dermatologist Dr. Saloni Aggarwal (MBBS, MS) Consultant Gynaecologist & Obstetrician Dr. Shadab Samad (MBBS, MD) Consultant- Cardiology Dr. Kuldeep (MBBS, MS) Consultant Urologist Dr. Virender Singh (MBBS, MS) Consultant ENT Dr. Shalabh Goel (MBBS, MD) Consultant Anaesthetist Dr. Atul Jain (MBBS, MD) Consultant Anaesthetist What Our patients Say's Best skin hospital in Yamuna Vihar, Delhi. Senior dermatologist Dr. Anuj Aggarwal is the best there for skin and hair-related diseases. Staff is good and supportive. Varsha Tanwar Dr. Aggarwal's Wellness Multispeciality Hospital Yamuna Vihar offers a wide range of best services. I have consulted with Dr. Anuj Aggarwal and I am very satisfied so I recommend this hospital and its doctors also. They give proper attention to everyone and don't hurry.  The staff is also very caring and friendly and Dr. Anuj Aggarwal is a very good doctor. Imran Khan Dr. Aggarwal's Wellness Multispeciality Hospital is One Of the best hospitals near my location. The hospital has very professional doctors and staff, excellent facilities, and patient friendly. I have my child treated by a pediatric doctor. The experience was very good..5 stars for this hospital. Rashid Siddiqui The doctors at Dr. Aggarwal's Wellness Multispeciality Hospital are very dedicated to their work. Their attention is always focused on the patients. They treat me very well. I got knee pain a long time ago, and I was treated by a doctor at a wellness hospital, and they treat me very well. Well-trained staffs and doctors are excellent. Sanjay Varma Notice Dr. Aggarwal's Wellness Multispeciality Hospital has constituted an Internal Complaint committee to develop guidelines to combat sexual harassment and violence. The committee deals with issues relating to sexual harassment at Dr. Aggarwal's Wellness Multispeciality Hospital . It is applicable to all staff and consultants. A complaint of discrimination or sexual harassment may be lodged by the victim or a third party. Please Wait...
